title: Sentinel Grid: Minimum-Discrepancy Pandemic Contact-Net Surveillance
strategies: pseudo-random scatter baseline: a deterministic LCG placement (valid but uneven) that reproduces the checker's internal baseline and scores ~0.1
Kronecker / additive-recurrence lattice: x_i^k = frac((i+1)*sqrt(prime_k)), a cheap moderate-quality low-discrepancy spread
Hammersley/Halton plus best-of-shifts: fixed first coordinate (i+0.5)/M with radical-inverse coordinates in distinct prime bases, choosing the best deterministic Cranley-Patterson shift
further optimisation over probe positions minimising the exactly-computed L2 star discrepancy (open-ended: no known optimal set for these (d,M))
